sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 131:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 131:1
items.html: It is because giving the seven lights to Bina was through refinement to phase one, but the male of Bina, which was emanated by Hochma, was on the level of phase two, but in the form of posterior. Hence, it bestowed it to the vessel of Bina only in inverting of the anterior to VAK, before it was refined to phase one.
